nasb.text: I said, “In the middle of my life I am to enter the gates of Sheol; I am to be deprived of the rest of my years.”

esv.text: I said, In the middle of my days I must depart; I am consigned to the gates of Sheol for the rest of my years.

cnv.text: 我曾說：在我盛年之際， 我竟要進入陰間之門； 我餘剩的年日，竟被奪去。

ccb.text: “我以为自己盛年之际， 就要踏入阴间之门， 不能享受余年。

csbs.text: “我曾说：我如日中天就要进入阴间之门； 我余剩的岁月竟被剥夺！
